# flashduty_member_invite (Resource)

Invites a member to Flashduty. The invited member will be created and can login to activate their account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Invite a new member with email and phone
resource "flashduty_member_invite" "john" {
  email        = "john.doe@example.com"
  member_name  = "John Doe"
  country_code = "CN"
  phone        = "10000000000"
}

# Invite member with email only
resource "flashduty_member_invite" "alice" {
  email       = "alice@example.com"
  member_name = "Alice Smith"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `country_code` (String) The country code for the phone number. Defaults to `CN`.
- `email` (String) The email address of the member. At least one of `email` or `phone` must be provided.
- `member_name` (String) The name of the member. Required when using phone number.
- `phone` (String) The phone number of the member. At least one of `email` or `phone` must be provided.
- `ref_id` (String) An external reference ID for the member.
- `role_ids` (List of Number) A list of role IDs to assign to the member.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the invited member.
- `member_id` (Number) The Flashduty member ID assigned after invitation.
